name: barcen-platform
description: Monorepo for the Barcen Barangay Census frontend and backend applications.

scripts.postinstall: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.start:all: mkdir -p data/db && ./mongodb-macos-x86_64-7.0.5/bin/mongod --dbpath data/db --logpath data/mongod.log --fork && npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
